label: false-dup
a: Canary traffic split: 5% → 20% → 50% → 100%, with 30-minute observation windows between stages.
b: Canary rollback criteria: automatic rollback triggers if p99 latency increases more than 10% above baseline OR if error rate increases more than 10% above baseline during any canary stage observation window.
reviewer_notes: Both describe canary deploys but A is the traffic-split schedule and B is the rollback criteria/thresholds. Different facets of the same policy — keeping both is informative.
